name: Pecan Sandies
recipeInstructions:
In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and confectioners' sugar. Add water and vanilla; mix well.
Gradually add flour; stir in pecans until just combined.
Roll dough into 1-inch balls. Place on ungreased baking sheets and flatten with fingers.
Bake at 300°F for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Cool on a wire rack. Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
